sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import "./Dashboard.css"; import { Cloud, Sprout, ShoppingBag, Building2, Map, FileBarChart, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Phone, Send, ChevronRight, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; const marketPrices = [ { icon:'🌾', name:'Rice', price:'₹2800 / Quintal', change:'+2.5%', up:true }, { icon:'🍅', name:'Tomato', price:'₹32 / Kg', change:'-1.2%', up:false }, { icon:'🧅', name:'Onion', price:'₹28 / Kg', change:'-0.8%', up:false }, { icon:'🌿', name:'Cotton', price:'₹7600 / Quintal', change:'+1.5%', up:true } ]; const forecast = [ { day:'Today', icon:'⛅', temp:'31°C', rain:'20%' }, { day:'Tomorrow', icon:'🌧️', temp:'30°C', rain:'40%' }, { day:'Monday', icon:'☀️', temp:'33°C', rain:'10%' }, { day:'Tuesday', icon:'☀️', temp:'34°C', rain:'0%' } ]; const schemes = [ { icon:'👨‍🌾', name:'PM Kisan Samman Nidhi', desc:'Direct income support', color:'#fff3e0', border:'#ff9800' }, { icon:'🛡️', name:'PM Fasal Bima Yojana', desc:'Crop insurance', color:'#e8f5e9', border:'#4caf50' }, { icon:'💧', name:'PM Krishi Sinchai', desc:'Irrigation support', color:'#e3f2fd', border:'#2196f3' }, { icon:'💳', name:'Kisan Credit Card', desc:'Easy farmer credit', color:'#f3e5f5', border:'#9c27b0' } ]; const quickActions = [ { icon:Cloud, label:'Weather', color:'#3b82f6' }, { icon:Sprout, label:'Crop Advisor', color:'#22c55e' }, { icon:ShoppingBag, label:'Market Prices', color:'#f59e0b' }, { icon:Building2, label:'Government Schemes', color:'#8b5cf6' }, { icon:FileBarChart, label:'Reports', color:'#06b6d4' }, { icon:Map, label:'Maps', color:'#ef4444' } ]; export default function Dashboard({setActivePage}){ const [chatInput,setChatInput]=useState(''); const [chatMessages,setChatMessages]=useState([]); function handleSend(){ if(!chatInput.trim()) return; let reply=''; const q=chatInput.toLowerCase(); if(q.includes('rice')){ reply='Rice needs NPK fertilizer.'; } else if(q.includes('cotton')){ reply='Cotton grows well in warm weather.'; } else if(q.includes('rain')){ reply='Tomorrow rain probability is 40%.'; } else if(q.includes('fertilizer')){ reply='Organic fertilizer is recommended.'; } else{ reply='Please ask another farming question.'; } setChatMessages(prev=>[ ...prev, { text:chatInput, user:true }, { text:reply, user:false } ]); setChatInput(''); } return(

setChatInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e)=>e.key==='Enter' && handleSend()} />
